scripts.build: pnpm --filter @digahash/metadata-core build && pnpm --filter @digahash/metadata-react --filter @digahash/metadata-vue --filter @digahash/metadata-angular build && pnpm --filter demo-react --filter demo-vue --filter demo-vanilla --filter demo-angular build
scripts.docker:install: docker run --rm -it -v "$(pwd):/app" -w /app node:24-slim sh -lc "corepack enable && pnpm install"
scripts.docker:build: docker run --rm -it -v "$(pwd):/app" -w /app node:24-slim sh -lc "corepack enable && pnpm --filter @digahash/metadata-core build && pnpm --filter @digahash/metadata-react --filter @digahash/metadata-vue --filter @digahash/metadata-angular build && pnpm --filter demo-react --filter demo-vue --filter demo-vanilla --filter demo-angular build"
